rationale: MBRControl Enable and Done were set true, but DoneOnReset was set to the empty set. The evidence says an empty set means no reset changes Done, so after PowerCycle Done remains true and MBRDone is 1.

label: FAIL
rationale: MBRControl Enable and Done were set true, and DoneOnReset was empty. Because an empty DoneOnReset set prevents any reset from changing Done, PowerCycle should leave Done true and MBRDone should be 1 rather than 0.
